mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, article_id, type, message, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, #{type}, #{message}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, a.title AS article_title FROM notification n LEFT JOIN article a ON n.article_id = a.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId} AND type = 'like' AND create_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE)
